# fallinsurancepaper MCP

> Companion MCP for fallinsurancepaper · minted by mint-all · sovereign estate · MCP server for Claude/Cursor/Codex · MIT-licensed · Ed25519-signed · listed on FallMarket.

fallinsurancepaper MCP is a sovereign tool built by the AI-Native Solutions guild. It runs on your machine, ships with source, and never phones home.

## Canonical URL

https://sjgant80-hub.github.io/fallinsurancepaper-mcp/

## Category

MCP server for Claude/Cursor/Codex. Part of the FallMarket sovereign agent marketplace (https://sjgant80-hub.github.io/fallmarket/).

## Install

```
claude mcp add fallinsurancepaper -- npx -y @ai-native-solutions/fallinsurancepaper-mcp
```

## About AI-Native Solutions

AI-Native Solutions builds sovereign single-file AI tools, MCP servers, SDKs, and HTTP APIs. All work is MIT, all is Ed25519-signed, all is discoverable via FallMarket. This tool is one entry in a 766-listing catalog.
